headline: Wells Fargo Downgrades Sherwin-Williams to Equal-Weight, Lowers Price Target to $365
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Michael Sison   downgrades Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $410 to $365.
